decisions.title_en: Meta puts custom 'Iris' AI chip into production, doubling compute to 14GW
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Reuters exclusive July 9 memo: Iris ASIC (Broadcom/TSMC) enters mass production in Sept to reduce Nvidia reliance, compute doubling 7GW->14GW by 2027.

decisions.title_en: US reclassifies UAE to Country Group A:5, allowing license-free AI chip exports
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. BIS effective July 10 moved UAE from D:3/D:4 to A:5, enabling license-free advanced AI chips to G42/Core42.

decisions.title_en: Sysdig documents JADEPUFFER, first fully autonomous AI-agent ransomware attack
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Sysdig report (widely reported ~July 7-8) on first end-to-end LLM-driven extortion; event_date 2026-07-08 within 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: Google Search goes fully generative, Gemini 3.5 Flash replaces link lists
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 10 rollout: Gemini 3.5 Flash now powers AI Mode / generative default across Search.

decisions.title_en: Fed's Warsh names Marc Andreessen to co-lead AI Productivity & Jobs task force
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 9 Fed announcement of five external task forces; a16z's Andreessen co-leads Productivity & Jobs panel.

decisions.title_en: Meta to build first Canadian data center, $10B in Alberta with 932MW gas plant
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Bloomberg July 8: Meta's first Canadian DC in Sturgeon County, ~1GW, powered by dedicated natural gas.

decisions.title_en: Mistral releases Robostral Navigate, 8B single-camera robot navigation model
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. July 8 launch of vision-only embodied navigation model, Mistral's physical-AI push.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO targeting September at $730-850B
decisions.reason: Confidential S-1 filing was June 8, 2026 (>5 days old). July digests rehashed it; no new July development.

decisions.title_en: Nvidia holds above $5 trillion market cap
decisions.reason: Nvidia first crossed $5T in April 2026 and $5.5T in May; July 10 ~$5.11T is not a discrete fresh milestone.

decisions.title_en: Apple formally files trade-secret complaint vs OpenAI citing 400 ex-employees
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-10 as '苹果反手起诉OpenAI窃密,并官宣新Siri改用Google Gemini'. July 11 formal filing adds only the 400-employee figure; no substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI ChatGPT Work / Codex merge, Atlas deprecation
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-09 as the ChatGPT 'work OS' story. Nothing substantively new.
Grok 4.5 / simultaneous flagship launches already published 07-09 and 07-10 (incl. independent evals). No new info.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches DeployCo, acquires Tomoro consulting firm
decisions.reason: DeployCo launched May 11, 2026 (>5 days old). Surfaced in July partnership searches but not a July development.

decisions.title_en: Crusoe in talks to raise $3B, tripling valuation to ~$30B
decisions.reason: Bloomberg reported the talks July 2, 2026 (>5 days old).

decisions.title_en: HHS deploys ChatGPT (AERO) to scan Medicaid/Medicare audits
decisions.reason: AERO initiative launched May 21, 2026 (>5 days old). July 10 digest was a rehash.

decisions.title_en: Agility Robotics to go public via $2.5B SPAC (Churchill Capital XI)
decisions.reason: SPAC deal announced June 24, 2026 (>5 days old). Unitree's Shanghai registration cleared 'early July' but no firm dated event in window.
